summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. Verified Feed API (posts CRUD, likes, comments), Marketplace API (products CRUD, orders with escrow, categories, 5% commission), and frontend integration. All 50 backend tests passed (26 new + 24 existing). Frontend UI flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Feed API correctly implements posts CRUD with likes and comments
Marketplace API correctly implements products CRUD with escrow system
5% commission correctly deducted on order confirmation
Escrow flow works: buyer pays -> funds held -> buyer confirms -> seller receives (minus 5%)
Feed page shows real posts from API (not demo data)
Services hub shows Marketplace as 'Actif', others as 'Bientot disponibles'
No wallet/chat/profile duplication in Services page
All 5 nav blocks accessible: Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil
seed_data_creation: Created test posts, products, and orders during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified Phase 2 consolidation: Feed API and Marketplace module. Key features tested: (1) Feed posts API - create, list, like, comment all working, (2) Marketplace API - products CRUD, orders with escrow, categories (9 total), 5% commission on order confirmation, (3) FeedPage uses real API data, (4) ServicesPage has hub view with Marketplace active and marketplace view with products/search/categories, (5) Create product form works end-to-end, (6) All 5 nav blocks functional. Escrow flow verified: buyer deposits -> buys product -> funds deducted -> buyer confirms -> seller receives amount minus 5% fee.

backend_api_tests.existing_tests: 24/24 passed - Auth, Wallet, Messaging, Admin, Users

frontend_ui_tests: Login with admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! redirects to /feed
Feed page loads with real posts from API
Create post form works - post appears in feed
Like toggle works - heart fills and count updates
Marketplace page shows products from API
Search input and category filter present
Create product form opens and works end-to-end
Product created successfully with success message
All 5 nav blocks accessible: Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil

escrow_flow_verified.step2: Buyer purchases product - funds deducted from wallet
escrow_flow_verified.step3: Order created with status 'pending', funds in escrow
